# External Fonts — Licenses

All fonts in this directory are distributed under the **SIL Open Font License
1.1 (OFL)**. See <https://scripts.sil.org/OFL>.

## Included fonts

| Filename | Family | License | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| NotoSerifKR-Regular.otf | Noto Serif CJK KR | OFL 1.1 | github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk |
| NotoSerifKR-Bold.otf | Noto Serif CJK KR | OFL 1.1 | github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk |
| NotoSerifSC-Regular.otf | Noto Serif CJK SC | OFL 1.1 | github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk |
| NotoSerifTC-Regular.otf | Noto Serif CJK TC | OFL 1.1 | github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk |
| NotoSerifJP-Regular.otf | Noto Serif CJK JP | OFL 1.1 | github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk |
| NanumMyeongjo-Regular.ttf | Nanum Myeongjo | OFL 1.1 | github.com/google/fonts (ofl/nanummyeongjo) |
| NanumMyeongjo-Bold.ttf | Nanum Myeongjo | OFL 1.1 | same |
| NanumMyeongjo-ExtraBold.ttf | Nanum Myeongjo | OFL 1.1 | same |
| NanumBrushScript-Regular.ttf | Nanum Brush Script | OFL 1.1 | github.com/google/fonts (ofl/nanumbrushscript) |
| NanumPenScript-Regular.ttf | Nanum Pen Script | OFL 1.1 | github.com/google/fonts (ofl/nanumpenscript) |
| SongMyung-Regular.ttf | Song Myung | OFL 1.1 | github.com/google/fonts (ofl/songmyung) |
| GowunBatang-Regular.ttf | Gowun Batang | OFL 1.1 | github.com/google/fonts (ofl/gowunbatang) |
| GowunBatang-Bold.ttf | Gowun Batang | OFL 1.1 | same |

## Use

These fonts are used **in-process, non-redistributed**, to rasterize synthetic
training images for a CJK single-character classifier. They are not shipped as
part of any produced artifact. OFL Section 1 (copying, modification, and
rendering) applies.
